● Last Week Summarised
Strong volume growth this week.
Purchases up 30%, revenue up 16%.

Mon 13 Apr – Sun 19 Apr 2026 vs Mon 6 Apr – Sun 12 Apr 2026.

This week saw a significant step-up in spend — +38% more invested — which drove 30% more purchases and 16% more revenue vs the prior week. ROAS pulled back slightly to 4.84x from 5.75x as the higher spend volume was absorbed, while cost per purchase held firm at €13.01 vs €12.30 prior week — a strong signal the account is scaling efficiently.

💰 €30,620 revenue ↑+15.8%
🛒 486 purchases ↑+29.9%
🎯 4.84x ROAS ↓−15.8% vs 5.75x
💸 €13.01 CPP ↑+5.8% vs €12.30
📈 €6,323 spend ↑+37.5%
